mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carousel (title, description, image, product_id, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{image}, #{productId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM carousel ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM carousel WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id DESC
